digest.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
digest.tldr: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.

digest.title: Hands Free, AIs Forward: NVIDIA XR AI Brings Agents to AR Glasses
digest.tldr: NVIDIA XR AI is now available in public beta, giving developers a framework for building multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices.

digest.title: Coherent Breaks Ground on Expanded Texas Facility, Scaling AI’s Optical Backbone
digest.tldr: AI runs at the speed of light.  More and more, that light is made in Texas.
